user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new document type, so that organization and employee documents can be categorized consistently
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Document Types screen; When I click Add new document type and provide a type, description and applicable modules; Then the document type is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing document type, so that I can update its description or applicable modules
acceptance_criteria: Given a document type is listed; When I click Edit and change its details; Then the updated document type is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to see which modules each document type applies to, so that I know where the type can be used
acceptance_criteria: Given document types exist; When I view the list; Then each row shows Type, Description and Applicable modules

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through and refresh the document types list, so that I can review all defined types
acceptance_criteria: Given more document types exist than one page; When I use pagination or Refresh; Then the list reloads with current document types
